dj_text: That was Xue hua piao piao (Medieval version). Now settling into Daft Punk - Around The World (Bardcore, Medieval style).
commercial_text: We interrupt this broadcast to bring you... nothing. We just wanted your attention. Carry on.
hijack_text: THIS IS PIRATE RADIO 404 FROM THE VOID!
recovery_text: We're back. That was NOT a crossover event. That was a dimensional bleed.
title: Daft Punk - Around The World (Bardcore, Medieval style)
